title: Assistant Store Manager - Spencer's Retail - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Spencer's Retail - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Spencer's Retail invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Assistant Store Manager at our Ghaziabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Spencer's Retail:
Spencer's Retail is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Spencer's Retail!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
